name: devrig
description: Containerized AI coding environment with browser control

scripts.test: node --test test/unit.test.js test/init.test.js test/cleanup.test.js test/clean.test.js test/configure.test.js test/session.test.js test/logs.test.js test/exec.test.js test/doctor.test.js test/update.test.js test/scaffold.test.js test/bridge.test.js test/env.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: node --test --experimental-test-coverage test/unit.test.js test/init.test.js test/cleanup.test.js test/configure.test.js test/session.test.js test/logs.test.js test/exec.test.js test/doctor.test.js test/update.test.js test/env.test.js
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run lint:shell && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm test

author: Ondrej Dolejsi (https://github.com/fuho)
